description: Phase 5 (ADR 01066) escape-hatch companion to reuse-leakage: `browser.freshSession: true` forces a cold session per context even for the Chromium family, opting out of the reuse pool. Test A plants localStorage; test B, whose context sets freshSession:true, starts a brand-new session and therefore sees no planted state. This confirms the escape hatch runs and yields a clean session. Headed Chrome only (Windows/macOS); every other leg SKIPs.

tests.description: Plant localStorage on a freshSession:true context.
A freshSession:true context never reuses, so the planted state is absent.
